productDisplayName: Nike Men Feild Trainer textile Maroon Sports Shoes
description: Classic and comfortable, the nike Field Trainer textile shoe is a classic example of absolute cushioned comfort, better Fit and dynamic support. This is a great add-on to your wardrobe. The Dynamic Support platform in the midsole adapts to the runner's varying strides and offers on-demand support. Featuring a nike+ Ready option, this shoe can be teamed with Nike+ compatible iPods, stop watches and much more to clock your fitness regime.UpperSynthetic, textile and suede upper for maximum ventilation and durabilityHas a padded tongue and textile lined sockliner for a snug fit and added protection from shockLace-up system for a snug, customised fitPerforated sides for ample ventilationMidsoleFull length EVA midsole for added cushioning and impact protectionMildly cushioned footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleUnique tip to heel TPR outsole with vertical lugs across the length of the sole for optimum traction on various surfaces Horizontal flex grooves for flexible foot movementSemi-circular grooved forefoot with a pivot point for easy 180° rotation of the foot without causing injuryShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
